introSection: Batflyer is a steel suspended kiddie roller coaster currently located at Nasu Highland Park in Nasu, Nasu, Tochigi, Japan.

sections.title: History
sections.content: In February 2024, Nasu Highland Park began a crowdfunding campaign to reopen the ride. This reopening would eventually happen on 12 April 2024.

fullText:
Batflyer is a steel suspended kiddie roller coaster currently located at Nasu Highland Park in Nasu, Nasu, Tochigi, Japan.

In February 2024, Nasu Highland Park began a crowdfunding campaign to reopen the ride. This reopening would eventually happen on 12 April 2024.
